title: Fuzzy Prawn Boil
description: A kid-friendly American dish featuring fresh king prawns in a silky broth that's both delicious and easy to make. This recipe is also suitable for those following a fodmap diet.
instructions: Place the king prawns in a large pot.
Add water and chicken bouillon cube to the pot.
Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce to a simmer.
Simmer gently for about 5 minutes, adding minced garlic during the last minute of cooking.
Season with salt to taste. Remove from heat immediately once done.
Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
